name: Weston Priory
description: Weston Priory is a Benedictine monastery in Weston, Vermont. Founded in 1953, the community of monks is known for their music, hospitality, and commitment to peace and justice. The priory welcomes guests for retreats and offers a contemplative atmosphere rooted in the Benedictine tradition of prayer, work, and community. Their liturgical music has reached a wide audience.
